---
title: "assignment01-data"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{assignment01-data}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Assignment 01: Working with Spatial Data

In this assignment, you will learn to:

- Load spatial data
- Inspect coordinate reference systems (CRS)
- Create simple maps
- Perform basic transformations

Use the example dataset included in the `mycourse` package.

```{r setup}
library(spatialcourseOL)
```
